source_inspiration.notes: Guild-native named provider/model fallback chains inspired by 9Router combos. Runtime support expands combo names into cartridge ladders; default capability ladders are unchanged until explicitly switched.

coding-stack.label: Coding fallback stack
coding-stack.notes: Default real-provider coding order expressed as a named combo.

review-stack.label: Review fallback stack
review-stack.notes: Current reviewer route as a named combo; add additional reviewer cartridges here before changing join-review-worker defaults.

deterministic-demo-stack.label: Deterministic demo stack
deterministic-demo-stack.notes: No-provider demo path for proving file output and final assembly without paid/quota provider calls.
